What is best GMurphy team I can make?
GMurphy, Myriam, Tulu, Goliath / Faros
Consider raising Myriam to E2
What difference between Goliath and Faros?

For WoD, you can give GMurphy Uteri Somnia + Blade of the Titan, give Myriam Incalculable Factor + To My Dearest Friend (consider Power of the Pious or Rewinding Time), give Tulu Power of the Pious or Rewinding Time + Moment of Reunion, give Goliath Admist the Downpour + Sever & Scar or for Faros give her Admist the Downpour + Cursed Binding
Soulforge wise, Goliath gives you bonus Strength Generation meanwhile Faros grants Damage Amplication
goliath gives u bigger burst on your burst turn while faros is more defensive/utility oriented

In terms of Cards / Exalts, Goliath's gimmick is removing the Target's Strength  + obtain the same amount (both temporarily) through his 1 - Cost Skill and for Exalt you can choose between obtaining temporary Strength equal to a percentage of your Tentacle Damage or raising his unique Card's Damage Output

Meanwhile, Faros will generate lots of Poison on Targets through her Cards and provides you Utility through her Exalt in allowing you to pick up to 3 Cards from Draw Pile and adding them directly to your Hand

I just started and I want to do poison characters, who and what should I get

poison is kinda situational, it is decent on bosses and horrible for mob fights, so you will run into all kinds of problems at endgame that you have to deal with

if you want to run poison some core units are gdoll, lily, nymphaea. after that, theres a variety of builds depending on who your main poison applier is

miryam and 24 are used in aequor but 24 kinda fell off a cliff

liz and daffodil are used in ultra

agrippa is the only poison caro unit, thais technically poisons but shes more of a general support
I suggest having a main meta team so that you can at least clear story without difficulty, you can build a poison team on the side
is this enough for my gmurphy or not? or should i change some substate?
having multiple teams is nice for dtide or if you just get bored of your main team
theres usually at least one wave that you can run poison

and maybe get castor from the posse selector
you can also get gdoll but she kinda sucks without dupes
if you get her to e1 or better with monthly dupe item from shop then she also works in that team
gdoll is probably the most important glue for poison teams

I am very certain I need some help with my team.
I just beat chapter7 (normal) and only got through by the skin of my teeth. And after some statement in the game chat I think it is better to ask, if my current team comp is really that bad:
well
i wouldnt say its the worst thing ever
but i can see you struggle abit
especially when you didnt bring gluttony for that extra max health
I wonder if I should remove the 1000 keyflare wheels🤔
gluttony is probaby better than it
max health is very powerful

its not that bad, you just probably lack experience and levels on your characters

gear can be switched around a bit but the basic team comp works fine

here is the loadout i recommend for you:

corpo - crimson pulse covenant, blade of the titan, to my dearest friend

aurita - scarlet embrace covenant, gluttony, emerge

thais - life drain covenant, wheels are ok

tulu - deus ex machina covenant, change 2nd wheel to frenzy
and posse encounter in pure white, if you arent running it already
It is the reason I run the keyflare wheels
team is more consistent once you get more corpo dupes
as well as dreams of medicine covenant for corpo
the thing about corporita discard comp is its not that strong objectively speaking, but its able to abuse a lot of the chapter resonance mechanics in story
so u have to know how to use those well
making a lot of copies of lightning retribution etc
it will also feel weaker if you dont have resonance fully unlocked
Miriyam seemed like a great replacement for Tulu...until I noticed that discard works counter to her retain/prepare stuff. 😅
aigis is also quite good
can try her out
